_comment: Brain-root hooks. Loaded for any session opened at brain/ or below. The gielinor/.claude/settings.json holds architectural guarantees scoped to gielinor sessions; this file holds cross-brain instrumentation.
_comment_status_sidecar: D-020 status-sidecar.py registrations TEMPORARILY REDUCED to SessionEnd only. The PreToolUse/PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit/Stop registrations were disabled while investigating a terminal-rendering glitch in VS Code that correlated with the doubled hook-fire rate. Re-enable after the issue is diagnosed or a lower-frequency design ships.
